entities.name: RPE Scale
entities.context: Rate of Perceived Exertion scale (1-10) used to quantify workout intensity from V's self-reported descriptions

entities.name: Metadata Extraction
entities.context: Step 3 in a pipeline that parses V's natural language workout descriptions into structured fields

entities.name: Duration
entities.context: Workout duration metric extracted from phrases like 'X minutes' or 'took about X min'

entities.name: Felt Before
entities.context: Pre-workout subjective state captured from descriptions like 'felt good going in', 'was tired', 'stiff'

entities.name: Felt After
entities.context: Post-workout subjective state captured from descriptions like 'felt easy', 'was gassed', 'could do more'

entities.name: Context Notes
entities.context: Situational metadata about workout conditions, e.g. 'back was tight', 'got interrupted'

entities.name: Bio-Log
entities.context: V's self-reporting system where natural language descriptions are parsed into structured workout metadata

relationships.context: RPE is one of the key fields extracted during the metadata extraction step
Duration is extracted alongside RPE from V's workout descriptions
Pre-workout feeling is a structured field parsed from free-text input
Post-workout feeling is a structured field parsed from free-text input
Situational context is captured as supplementary metadata
Bio-Log is the broader system that uses metadata extraction to structure V's self-reports
